title: gtq-14-physics-broken-in-two

extracted_equations.text: \chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt

G μν = Einstein curvature tensor. Λ = cosmological constant. g μν = metric tensor. T μν = stress-energy tensor. Plain English: Mass and energy curve spacetime; curved spacetime tells mass how to move. Deterministic, geometric, observer-independent — the Logos signature in the large-scale physics. The Born Rule (Quantum Probability)

P = probability of a measurement outcome. ψ = system wavefunction (in superposition). ϕ = measurement basis state. Plain English: The best the quantum frame can do is give probabilities. The framework reads this as the structural signature of receiver noise — what a decoupled instrument produces when reading a Logos-structured source. Master Equation (referenced)

; that symbol is now reserved for the cosmological constant. Logos Coupling — The interaction architecture The channel structure between the Logos field and embedded subsystems — how the field acts on a measurement. Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.) Entropy / Sin (
chi_local = G * M * E * S_eff * T * K * R * Q * F * C
$$\chi = \iiint (G \cdot M \cdot E \cdot S \cdot T \cdot K \cdot R \cdot Q \cdot F \cdot C) \, dx \, dy \, dt$$
Logos Field ($\chi$) — The pervasive coherent substrate

The channel structure between the Logos field and embedded subsystems — how the field acts on a measurement. Field = pervasive substrate; coupling = how interactions occur within it. (Defined in detail in Article 01.)
